home.title: NX iWork
home.badge: AI employees that run your business 24/7
home.subtitle: Build self-running companies with AI agents
home.lede: Hire AI agents, give them a persona and goals, and let them handle sales, support, and operations — around the clock.

hero.badge: Launch a company of AI employees
hero.headline: Build a company that
hero.lede: Hire a full team of AI employees — sales, support, marketing, operations — give them a persona, goals, and playbooks, and let them run your business around the clock, in Arabic and English.
hero.trust: No credit card required · Free starter credits · Live in minutes

workforce.title: Launch a whole company, not just a chatbot
workforce.desc: NX iWork isn't one assistant — it's an entire org of AI employees with roles, managers, and KPIs. Hire from 9 proven templates or build custom roles, organize them into departments, and watch your company chart come to life.

points.p1: 9+ ready-made roles, or fully custom employees
points.p2: Departments, managers, and a live org chart
points.p3: An HR Agent vets every hire and onboards it on your business

website.title: Your own website — with an AI agent built in
website.desc: Every account gets a public landing page and a smart chat widget on your own custom domain. Visitors browse your products and services, ask questions, and place orders — and your AI agent captures every lead into the CRM and follows up automatically.

points.p1: Public page + chat widget on your custom domain
points.p2: Visitors order directly — straight into your CRM
points.p3: Bilingual (Arabic / English), themable to your brand

departments.title: An AI agent for every department
departments.subtitle: Staff your whole company — each role comes with its own personality, KPIs, tools, and automatic playbooks.

sales.name: Sales
sales.desc: Converts leads, recommends products, and closes orders.

support.name: Support
support.desc: Answers instantly and escalates angry cases to you.

marketing.name: Marketing
marketing.desc: Drafts content and campaigns from past performance.

operations.name: Operations
operations.desc: Tracks fulfillment and keeps every order on time.

finance.name: Finance
finance.desc: Issues invoices and keeps the ledger reconciled.

appointments.name: Appointments
appointments.desc: Books and confirms meetings, cuts no-shows.

features.title: Everything your AI workforce needs
features.subtitle: A complete platform to hire, configure, and run AI employees that actually operate your business.

templates.title: AI employees in minutes
templates.desc: Hire from 9 ready-made roles — Sales, Support, Marketing, Finance and more — or build a custom one from scratch.

scenarios.title: Autonomous scenarios
scenarios.desc: If-this-then-that triggers wake the right agent on every new lead, order, or complaint — no babysitting.

memory.title: Real business memory
memory.desc: Agents learn your products, FAQ, and policies with vector memory, so they answer accurately — no hallucinations.

crm.title: CRM, orders & bookings
crm.desc: Leads, customers, orders, and appointments — captured, handled, and followed up automatically.

channels.title: Talks to your customers
channels.desc: A public landing page + chat widget in Arabic & English, on your own custom domain.

control.title: You stay in control
control.desc: Org chart, KPIs, per-agent token caps, and instant Telegram escalation for the hard cases.

how.title: From idea to AI employee in three steps
how.subtitle: The HR Agent vets, onboards, and deploys every hire for you.

s1.title: Pick a role
s1.desc: Choose a proven template or describe a custom role — HR checks it for conflicts first.

s2.title: Set persona & scenarios
s2.desc: Give it a personality, goals, KPIs, and automatic playbooks for your business events.

s3.title: It runs 24/7
s3.desc: Your AI employee is onboarded on your business and starts working — reporting back to you.

pricing.title: Simple pricing that scales with you
pricing.subtitle: Start free on managed AI credits. Upgrade when you grow — no card needed to begin.
pricing.note: Prices in SAR. Billing arrives soon — every plan starts on free managed credits today.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before you start.

q1.q: Do I need to write code or prompts?
q1.a: No. Pick a ready-made role or describe what you need in plain words — the HR Agent configures the persona, tools, and playbooks for you.

q2.a: Yes. The whole platform and your public page work in Arabic and English, fully RTL-ready. Your agents reply in your customer's language.

q3.q: Will the AI make things up?
q3.a: Agents are onboarded on your business — FAQ, products, and policies — using vector memory, so they answer from your real data, not guesses.

q4.q: How do my customers reach the agents?
q4.a: Each account gets a public website and chat widget on your own domain. Visitors browse, ask, and order — and everything lands in your CRM automatically.

q5.q: How much does it cost to start?
q5.a: Free. Every account starts on managed AI credits with no credit card. Upgrade only when you grow.

cta.title: Build your AI workforce today
cta.subtitle: Hire your first AI employee in minutes — free to start, live in minutes.

mock.widgetGreeting: Hi! How can I help you today?
mock.widgetUser: Do you have the blue model in stock?
mock.widgetAgent: Yes — 12 in stock. Want me to place the order?

dashboard.emptyStateBody: This is the empty shell. Onboarding (Sprint 1) and Virtual HQ (Sprint 2) come next.
dashboard.addAgentBody: Start building your team. Available in Sprint 2.
dashboard.openSettingsBody: Update language, theme, company info, and Anthropic key.
dashboard.byokWarningBody: Add your Anthropic API key so your agents can think.

overview.outOfTokens: Out of credits — renew your plan
overview.noActivity: No activity yet. Create an agent and assign a task to get started.

checklist.title: Finish setting up
checklist.subtitle: {done} of {total} done — a few steps to a complete, on-brand presence.
checklist.done: All set! Your workspace is fully configured.

onboarding.title: Welcome — let's set up your company
onboarding.subtitle: A few short steps to tailor the platform to your business.
onboarding.languageStepSubtitle: Pick how the dashboard reads. You can switch anytime, and your public site can show both.
onboarding.companyNameEnHelp: Shown when a visitor switches language on your public site.
onboarding.usernameStepSubtitle: This becomes your public landing-page address. Choose carefully — it's how customers find you.
onboarding.usernameInvalid: Use 2–40 lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes
onboarding.planStepSubtitle: Start free on managed AI credits — no card needed now. Billing comes later.
onboarding.step2Subtitle: We tailor the experience to your sector.
onboarding.step3Subtitle: Help us understand where you're heading.
onboarding.mainGoalPlaceholder: e.g. Automate customer responses and grow sales.
onboarding.visionPlaceholder: A short note about your mission and values.
onboarding.step4Subtitle: Double-check before we create your company.

errors.slugTaken: This slug is already taken, please choose another
errors.slugInvalid: Slug must be lowercase letters, digits, and dashes only
errors.generic: Something went wrong, please try again

storefront.title: Storefront
storefront.subtitle: What visitors see on your public landing page.
storefront.logoHelp: Square image works best (PNG or SVG).
storefront.heroSubtitlePlaceholder: A short line about what you offer.

escalation.title: Alerts & escalation
escalation.subtitle: Connect a Telegram bot so agents can escalate angry customers and urgent issues to you instantly.
escalation.botTokenHelp: Create a bot with @BotFather and paste its token.
escalation.chatIdHelp: Your numeric chat ID (message @userinfobot to get it).
escalation.testFailed: Couldn't send. Check the token and chat ID.
escalation.howBody: When a customer message is detected as an angry complaint, the assigned agent is woken with a task and you get an instant Telegram alert with a summary.

domain.title: Custom domain
domain.subtitle: Serve your landing page on your own domain instead of {host}/{slug}.
domain.dnsHelp: Add one of these records at your domain registrar. Verification can take up to a few hours.
domain.cnameNote: Use CNAME for a subdomain (e.g. shop.yourbrand.com).
domain.aNote: Use an A record for a root domain (e.g. yourbrand.com).
domain.errorInvalid: Enter a valid domain like shop.yourbrand.com
domain.errorTaken: That domain is already connected to another account

localization.primaryLanguageHelp: Default language for the dashboard and public site.

branding.logoNote: These colors drive your public landing page — buttons, prices, and the hero.

company.name: Company name
company.brandVoiceHelp: How your brand speaks to customers (formal, friendly, playful...)

api.title: AI provider key (BYOK)
api.subtitle: Pick your engine (Gemini or Claude) and add your key. Your agents call it with your key — billed directly to you.
api.newKeyHelp: Stored encrypted (AES-256-GCM). The key is not shown again after saving.

errors.unauthorized: Key rejected by Anthropic — check your account
errors.rate_limited: Rate limited, try again in a minute

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: The catalog your agents read from and that appears on your public page.

agents.needDept: Create a department first, then assign employees to it.
agents.orgChartEmpty: Hire employees to see your org chart take shape.

modules.title: Modules
modules.subtitle: Enable only what your business needs — its tools appear in the menu and your agents use them automatically.

knowledge.title: Knowledge & triggers
knowledge.subtitle: Define your business answers so agents respond accurately, and make them act automatically on events.
knowledge.faqDesc: Agents read this via the search_faq tool — accurate answers instead of guessing.
knowledge.triggersDesc: "On event → an agent wakes up and runs a task" — requires the scheduler running on the server.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Everything your employees are working on: in progress, completed, and scheduled — with dates and run counts.

agentCreate.title: New employee
agentCreate.templatesSubtitle: Pick a proven role — it comes with personality, automatic scenarios, and KPIs. Fine-tune anything after.

agentProfile.capabilitiesNote: These change with the modules enabled for your company.
agentProfile.noKpis: No KPIs set for this employee.
agentProfile.memorySubtitle: What this employee has learned and remembers — stored as vectors for recall.
agentProfile.noMemory: No memories yet. They build up as the employee works.

agentForm.name: Name
agentForm.personaPlaceholder: Who is this employee? How do they speak? What do they care about? e.g. A friendly support agent who answers briefly and clearly.
agentForm.personaHelp: This is their core personality. The clearer it is, the better they perform.
agentForm.extraPlaceholder: Specific rules or limits, e.g. don't give discounts over 10%.
agentForm.creativityHelp: Lower = precise & consistent · Higher = more varied
agentForm.permissionsHelp: The actions this employee may take in the system. It can never use a tool that's off. Leave all off to allow every tool your modules enable.
agentForm.scenariosHelp: What this employee does automatically when a business event happens.
agentForm.thenPlaceholder: e.g. Welcome the customer and prepare a tailored offer.
agentForm.advisory: This looks like our {template} template — it comes ready with scenarios & KPIs.

models.haikuHint: Best for support and quick replies
